meaning: vt.献(身),致力,题献(一部著作给某人)
examples: She vowed to herself that she would dedicate her life to scientific studies.
Dedicate a small shelf or a drawer to lunch things and kit it out with the basics.
If working from home becomes permanent, employees will have to dedicate part of their private space to work.
Regardless of age, though, there are certain transgenerational reasons men and women decide to dedicate time to volunteering.
Many who dedicate themselves to altruistic causes experience similar bursts of energy and insight.
